transcript_facts:
- [Assessment] so , my impression of you at this time is that from a gout standpoint , everything is nice and stable .
- [Findings] um , all right , well , i'd like to go ahead and do a physical exam on you . let's first look at your vital signs . hey , dragon , show me the vital signs .
- [Findings] your heart is a nice regular rate and rhythm , and your lungs sound really clear .
- [Findings] uh , let's go ahead and take a look at some of your labs .
- [Findings] show me the autoimmune labs . show me the autoimmune profile . show me the esr .
- [Findings] show me the uric acid .
- [Findings] order a right elbow x-ray , and then i'd like to prescribe some meloxicam 15 milligrams once a day for the pain and the swelling .
- [History of Present Illness] um , my osteoarthritis has been flaring up a little bit lately , um , so i wan na get- talk about that primarily . i've been sitting at the computer , at the desk more , um , in the office so i do n't know if it's being stagnant in that position all day has um , increased flare-ups for that , but i wanted to talk to you about that .
- [History of Present Illness] all right , and um , any other joint pain ? okay , and any numbing or tingling in your hands ? when i'm typing for long periods of time , i feel a little bit of numbing , um , i try to shake out my arms a little bit .
- [History of Present Illness] all right , and i know that you've had this also , had this history of gout . you had some inflammation of your toe .
- [History of Present Illness] um , the medication you gave me really controlled it , and i have n't seen a flare-up since . all right , and how are you doing with your psoriasis ?
- [History of Present Illness] i- i know that we had given you some clobetasol for your scalp .
- [History of Present Illness] um , so looking at you , i do n't appreciate any cervical lymphadenopathy . on your right elbow , you do have some edema and inflammation of your right olecranon and there's some tenderness and an effusion right there .
- [History of Present Illness] okay , so she has pain- to palpation of the olecranon bursa and pain with pronation and supination .
- [History of Present Illness] okay , so pain with flexion and extension of the right arm . uh , your abdomen is nice and soft , and there's no lower extremity edema . you know , you have a lot of arthritis for someone so young , so we had sent off that autoimmune panel .
- [History of Present Illness] so , you know , it does n't look like you have any systemic arthritis , or sys- systemic inflammatory in process going on .
- [Plan] so carolyn is a 49-year-old female here for follow-up of her chronic problems .
- [Plan] i think that we should continue you on the colchicine 0.6 milligrams twice a day as needed for flare-ups of your gout . um , and then for your osteoarthritis , i'd like to go ahead and order a right elbow x-ray .
- [Plan] order meloxicam 15 milligrams once a day . and then i'd like to um , just see those- how- the x-ray show- shows up and the results of that before we refer you for any type of physical therapy , okay ?
- [Plan] we'll continue you on the steroid cream for your scalp , okay ?
